arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca makes surprise decisions for Leicester City game
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca makes several surprise inclusions in his Chelsea XI for the Premier League game at Leicester City on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall sends classy message to Leicester City star ahead of Chelsea return
arts.sum: Former Leicester City midfielder Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall has extended a heartfelt message of support Abdul Fatawu following the announcement of his season-ending injury. Dewsbury-Hall, who played a significant role in Leicester's return to the Premier League, followed Maresca to west London.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Chelsea: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates from King Power Stadium Email Emillia with your thoughts on the game Leicester starting XI: Mads Hermansen; James Justin, Wout Faes, Caleb Okoli, Victor Kristiansen; Harry Winks, Boubakary Soumaré, Wilfred Ndidi; Kasey McAteer, Bilal El Khannouss, Jamie Vardy (C). Chelsea starting XI: Robert Sánchez; Wesley Fofana, Benoît Badiashile, Levi Colwill, Marc Cucurella; Moises Caicedo, Enzo Fernandez (C), Cole Palmer; Noni Madueke, Joao Felix, Nicolas Jackson. arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Chelsea as Kasey McAteer starts amid four changes
arts.sum: Patson Daka is also on the bench and could make his first appearance of the season after overcoming injury. Kasey McAteer has been handed his first-ever Premier League start with Steve Cooper making four changes to his side to face Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca returns to the King Power stadium for the first time since joining Blues
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea travel to the King Power stadium to take on Leicester City in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: 'His way of playing': Pedro Neto names the former Chelsea star he looked up to

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Tottenham scouting English defender with ‘incredible future’ regularly
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Reading defender Andre Garcia. The 16-year-old is highly rated across England and he has a bright future ahead of himself. His performances have attracted the attention of the Premier League clubs, and it will be interesting to see if they decide to make a move for […] The post Chelsea and Tottenham scouting English defender with ‘incredible future’ regularly appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Patson Daka starts, formation change - Leicester City surprises Steve Cooper could spring vs Chelsea - Josh Holland - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Oliver Skipp hasn't started a Premier League game for Leicester since the 3-2 win over Southampton in the middle of October. The testing period for Leicester starts on Saturday with Enzo Maresca returning to LE2 with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Chelsea LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Palmer starts and Maresca returns
arts.sum: Chelsea can stay third with a victory at Leicester as Maresca faces the side he helped to promotion last season

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news: Reece James 'to undergo scan' on hamstring injury
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Reece James will reportedly undergo a scan to determine the length of his recovery time from his latest hamstring injury.
